title: ChimpCentralMods
description: Kitchen Sink Pack for ChimpCentral Community. Themeless and Agile.
body:
# Who & What This pack contains a variety of mods without following a specific theme. The mods contained in the pack may be added or removed as the community it is built around evolves. The current section of mods are vanilla+ style mods that add small additions to the game without adding ores. A new major version will indicate a change in the mod selection and Minecraft version. # Why This pack makes it easy to keep the ChimpCentral community in sync and up-to date. # How to Setup _(For people who are new to Modrinth)_
The mods can be installed manually by looking at the names and finding the mod.
Or easily use a launcher like Prism or Modrinth and add the mrpack. ## For Prism using Direct Download (Current) 1. On the Modrinth page, click download. 2. Open Prism. 3. Drag the ChimpCentralMods.mrpack onto the window. 4. Click OK. 5. Select and Launch the ChimpCentralMods instance. 6. If there is an update ## Update Prism using Direct Download (Current) 1. Repeat above steps 1-4 2. A Window will say "Similar modpack was found!" 3. Select Update existing instance. ## For Prism using Modrinth Public Listing (Soon maybe?) 1. Open Prism. 2. Click on the Add Instance button in the top left corner. 3. Select Modrinth as the repository host. 4. Search for ChimpCentralMods. 5. Click OK. 6. Select and Launch the ChimpCentralMods instance.
